caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or conducting an interview. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to fashion, business, or personal experiences, given the context of the setting and his attire. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional tone, typical of a podcast recording session.
